# MuleSoft JMS Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (1.10) of JMS Connector documentation.
> See [JMS Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/jms-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the JMS Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [JMS Connector 1.10](https://docs.mulesoft.com/jms-connector/latest/index.md)
- [Configure Message Acknowledgement with the JMS Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/jms-connector/latest/jms-ack.md)
- [Configure an ActiveMQ Connection for JMS Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/jms-connector/latest/jms-activemq-configuration.md)
- [JMS Connector Reference 1.10](https://docs.mulesoft.com/jms-connector/latest/jms-connector-reference.md)
- [Consume Messages with the JMS Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/jms-connector/latest/jms-consume.md)
- [JMS Connector Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/jms-connector/latest/jms-examples.md)
- [Listen for New Messages Using the JMS Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/jms-connector/latest/jms-listener.md)
- [Tune JMS Connector for Performance](https://docs.mulesoft.com/jms-connector/latest/jms-performance.md)
- [Publish and Consume Messages Within Flows Example](https://docs.mulesoft.com/jms-connector/latest/jms-publish-consume-example.md)
- [Publish Messages and Consume Replies Using the JMS Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/jms-connector/latest/jms-publish-consume.md)
- [Publish Messages Using JMS Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/jms-connector/latest/jms-publish.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure JMS Connector 1.10](https://docs.mulesoft.com/jms-connector/latest/jms-studio-configuration.md)
- [Configure Topic Subscriptions with JMS Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/jms-connector/latest/jms-topic-subscription.md)
- [Manage Transactions in JMS Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/jms-connector/latest/jms-transactions.md)
- [Troubleshooting JMS Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/jms-connector/latest/jms-troubleshooting.md)
- [Configuring XA Transactions in JMS Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/jms-connector/latest/jms-xa-transactions.md)
- [JMS Connector XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/jms-connector/latest/jms-xml-maven.md)
